name: handsontable
description: Handsontable is a JavaScript Data Grid available for React, Angular and Vue.
author: Handsoncode <hello@handsontable.com>

scripts.clean: rimraf commonjs es coverage tmp tmp_styles
scripts.lint: npm run build:styles && npm run eslint && npm run type-lint && npm run stylelint
scripts.lint:fix: npm run build:styles && npm run eslint:fix && npm run stylelint:fix && npm run type-lint:fix
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:types && npm run test:walkontable && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:production
scripts.test.random: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:types && npm run test:walkontable.random && npm run test:e2e.random && npm run test:production.random
scripts.test:walkontable: npm run build:walkontable && npm run test:walkontable.dump && npm run test:walkontable.puppeteer
scripts.test:walkontable.random: npm run build:walkontable && npm run test:walkontable.dump && npm run test:walkontable.puppeteer -- --random
scripts.test:production: npm run build:umd.min && npm run build:languages.min && npm run build:themes-umd.min && npm run test:production.dump && npm run test:e2e.puppeteer
scripts.test:production.random: npm run build:umd.min && npm run build:languages.min && npm run build:themes-umd.min && npm run test:production.dump && npm run test:e2e.puppeteer -- --random
scripts.test:production.dump: npm run build:styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs_e2e NODE_ENV=test-production env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js rspack ./test/helpers/index.js ./test/e2e/index.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:umd && npm run build:languages && npm run build:themes-umd && npm run test:e2e.dump && npm run test:e2e.puppeteer
scripts.test:e2e.random: npm run build:umd && npm run build:languages && npm run build:themes-umd && npm run test:e2e.dump && npm run test:e2e.puppeteer -- --random
scripts.test:e2e.verbose: npm run build:umd && npm run build:languages && npm run build:themes-umd && npm run test:e2e.dump && npm run test:e2e.puppeteer -- --verbose
scripts.test:e2e.dump: npm run build:styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs_e2e NODE_ENV=test-e2e env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js rspack ./test/helpers/index.js ./test/e2e/index.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js jest --testPathPattern=${npm_config_testpathpattern:-.}
scripts.test:unit.watch: npm run build:styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js jest --testPathPattern=${npm_config_testpathpattern:-.} --watch
scripts.test:mobile.dump: npm run build:styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs_e2e NODE_ENV=test-mobile env-cmd --no-override -f ../hot.config.js rspack ./test/helpers/index.js ./test/e2e/mobile/index.js
scripts.watch: npm run build:styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs NODE_ENV=watch env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js rspack --watch ./src/index.js
scripts.build:sequential: npm run clean && npm run build:umd && npm run build:umd.min && npm run build:commonjs && npm run build:es && npm run build:languages && npm run build:languages.es && npm run build:languages.min && npm run build:themes-umd && npm run build:themes-umd.min
scripts.build:es: npm run build:styles && env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js node scripts/swc-transpile.mjs --format esm --out-dir tmp --out-ext .mjs
scripts.build:umd: npm run build:all.styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs NODE_ENV=development env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js rspack ./src/index.js
scripts.build:umd-from-esm: npm run build:all.styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs NODE_ENV=development env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js rspack ./tmp/index.mjs
scripts.build:umd-from-cjs: npm run build:all.styles && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs NODE_ENV=development env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js rspack ./tmp/index.js
scripts.build:umd.min: npm run build:all.styles.min && cross-env-shell BABEL_ENV=commonjs NODE_ENV=production env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js rspack ./src/index.js
scripts.build:all.styles: npm run build:styles && npm run build:themes-css
scripts.build:all.styles.min: npm run build:styles.min && npm run build:themes-css.min
scripts.build:languages.es: env-cmd -f ../hot.config.js node scripts/swc-transpile.mjs --format esm --src-dir src/i18n/languages --out-dir languages --out-ext .mjs --lang-registration
